testcase.name: testToggleFollowExceptionHandling
testcase.system-out: Created User: Username: follower Email: follower@example.com Enabled: true Roles: 0 Created User: Username: following Email: following@example.com Enabled: true Roles: 0 FollowService.toggleFollow called with targetUserId: 06b9c2e6-1747-4ae9-9604-c0941adac5b5, follower: follower

testcase.system-out: Created User: Username: follower Email: follower@example.com Enabled: true Roles: 0 Created User: Username: following Email: following@example.com Enabled: true Roles: 0

testcase.name: testToggleFollowCreate
testcase.system-out: Created User: Username: follower Email: follower@example.com Enabled: true Roles: 0 Created User: Username: following Email: following@example.com Enabled: true Roles: 0 FollowService.toggleFollow called with targetUserId: c2dfd709-2eeb-41ac-8e55-da0031c77f1a, follower: follower Found following user: following Already following: false Creating follow relationship

testcase.name: testToggleFollowDelete

testcase.name: testGetFollowingCountZero
testcase.system-out: Created User: Username: follower Email: follower@example.com Enabled: true Roles: 0 Created User: Username: following Email: following@example.com Enabled: true Roles: 0
